seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
response:
Subject: Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due in two days. 

Due to some unexpected personal circumstances that have arisen this week, I have fallen slightly behind my intended schedule. I am working diligently to complete the assignment, but I would greatly appreciate an additional [Number] days to ensure the work meets the required standards.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause. I am committed to submitting high-quality work and appreciate your consideration of my situation.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Student ID Number]<turn|>
